from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN, MSO_ANCHOR
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os

# Slide dimensions (4:3 Standard)
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

# Color palette
DARK_BLUE = RGBColor(10, 25, 47)
DEEP_NAVY = RGBColor(3, 4, 94)
WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
SILVER = RGBColor(192, 192, 192)
ACCENT_BLUE = RGBColor(0, 180, 216)
LIGHT_BLUE = RGBColor(144, 224, 239)
MEDIUM_BLUE = RGBColor(0, 119, 182)
DARK_GRAY = RGBColor(50, 50, 70)
CARD_BG = RGBColor(15, 35, 65)
BORDER_SILVER = RGBColor(160, 160, 180)

# Fonts and sizes
TITLE_FONT = "Aptos"
BODY_FONT = "Calibri"
HEADING_SIZE = Pt(28)
SUBTITLE_SIZE = Pt(16)
BODY_SIZE = Pt(14)
SMALL_SIZE = Pt(12)
LARGE_TITLE = Pt(36)

# Margins and spacing
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.5)
CARD_GAP = Inches(0.2)
ROW_GAP = Inches(0.15)


def set_slide_background(slide, color=DARK_BLUE):
    """Fill slide with solid background color."""
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color
